findings.description: MagicMock auto-attributes bypass type constructors (UUID, int, Path) — silently raise ValueError, invisible when caught by broad except Exception. 9 tests appeared green while exercising only the error path.
findings.proposedRule: P63: When production code applies type constructors to context attributes, mock fixtures MUST set those attributes to values of the correct type.

findings.description: NOPASSWD sudoers entries for /bin/sh, /usr/bin/tee, /bin/rm effectively grant unrestricted root access. Dangerous when Docker socket is mounted.
findings.proposedRule: P64: Never grant NOPASSWD to shells or file-writing utilities. Use dedicated wrapper scripts.

findings.description: Credential values interpolated into pytest assertion messages leak to CI logs and test report artifacts on failure.
findings.proposedRule: P65: Assertion messages must describe what was expected, never include actual credential values.

findings.description: Kind taint-removal races API server in DooD. Use --retain + manual recovery. docker exec does not need --privileged for kubectl.
findings.proposedRule: P66: Kind DooD taint-recovery pattern with --retain and manual taint removal.

tests.notes: BLOCK resolved by fixing mock fixture type

security.notes: All 3 WARNs were true positives, fixed in f1e4325

wiring.notes: Same root cause as gate-tests BLOCK-1

spec.notes: WARN-1 resolved by mock fix, WARN-2 informational (no spec.md for debug work)
